sql_query.query: INSERT INTO activities (id, circle_id, user_id, actor_name, type, message, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, c.id, NULL, 'Ajo', 'reminder', 'This cycle''s pot is still filling. Drop your contribution to keep the circle on track.', $1::timestamptz FROM circles c WHERE c.status = 'active' AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contributions ct WHERE ct.circle_id = c.id AND ct.cycle = c.current_cycle) < c.seats
